name: Mara Greens Golf Simulator
about: Mara Greens Golf Simulator is a private indoor golf lounge located in Lathrup Village, MI, founded by the Takona brothers. It offers a cozy, quiet environment for golfers of all skill levels to play, practice, and connect, with no crowds or noise. The venue features three state-of-the-art simulator bays with 1,700+ world-class courses, interactive games, and floor-to-ceiling presentation screens suitable for meetings and events. Operating hours are Thursday through Monday with online reservations required from 9 AM to 11 AM, and walk-ins welcome from 2 PM to 8 PM, with standing tee times available on Tuesdays from 4 PM to 6 PM.
why_golfers_like_it: Private, quiet environment free from crowds and noise
Flexible membership options with priority booking
Suitable for both individual practice and group events

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB is allowed, catering can be brought for private events
BYOB is allowed, catering can be brought for private events

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, rental clubs are not available at this time, so you must bring your own set to play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, you are allowed to bring your own food and drink (BYOB) for personal sessions. For private events, you can bring your own catering for a fully customized experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but sessions are typically 1-hour long with no commitment.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly, with membership options allowing named golfers (child or adult) to bring one guest free per session.
